ogTitle: Keely vs Keilor Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Keely and Keilor Downs.
heading: Keely vs Keilor Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keely, Victoria and Keilor Downs, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keilor Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Keely (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keely or Keilor Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keely has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Keilor Downs scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keely scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Keilor Downs scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keely or Keilor Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keilor Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
